data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional strict mode to reject out-of-dictionary states.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an optional strict mode to reject out-of-dictionary states. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this strict mode, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this functionality is implemented or validated in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the implementation of optional strict mode to reject out-of-dictionary states.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the optional strict mode functionality.
